title: Powerhouse Parent Brand Identity
content: The Powerhouse parent brand does not use a single accent color like Achra (purple) or Vetra (green). Instead, it uses a neutral dark palette as the primary identity with --primary: #32373B in light mode, which inverts to --primary: #F3F5F7 in dark mode. The signature accent is a cyan-to-purple gradient defined as --accent-gradient: linear-gradient(135deg, #00D4FF, #7A3AFF), with individual tokens --accent-cyan: #00D4FF and --accent-purple: #7A3AFF. The brand is dark-first, with the dark theme background matching the powerhouse.io site at #0E0E0D. The Powerhouse package includes a card-design-guidelines.html for illustrated card patterns, a powerhouse-io.html website recreation, and logos for all sub-brands. Source: https://github.com/powerhouse-inc/design-systems/tree/main/powerhouse.
description: Powerhouse parent brand uses neutral dark primary #32373B with a signature cyan-to-purple accent gradient.
